title: Bring up SPI with a loopback and register read
description: Validate the controller with a MOSI-to-MISO loopback, then confirm a known-value register read from the real peripheral.
body: Use when commissioning a new SPI link before trusting peripheral data. Do not start with complex multi-byte transactions before the basic datapath is proven. Actions: short MOSI to MISO and verify sent bytes return unchanged, then read a fixed identity register from the peripheral and compare. Validation signals include a loopback that echoes the pattern exactly and a device-ID read matching the datasheet value. Risk boundary: a peripheral whose ID read is wrong may be miswired or in reset, so escalate to a wiring check before issuing configuration writes.
